data.title: CIS 2.1.1 Ensure S3 Bucket Policy is set to deny HTTP requests
data.description: Bucket acme-marketing-public-2024 in account 123456789012 does not enforce SSL.
data.recommendation: Add a bucket policy that denies aws:SecureTransport=false. (CIS control 2.1.1)

data.title: CIS 1.4 Ensure no root account access key exists
data.description: Root account access keys are present in account 123456789012.
data.recommendation: Delete root account access keys. (CIS control 1.4)

data.title: CIS 3.1 Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all regions
data.description: CloudTrail is not enabled in 4 regions for account 123456789012.

data.title: CIS 5.2 Ensure default security group restricts all traffic
data.description: Default SG sg-0123abcd allows 0.0.0.0/0 ingress on all ports.
data.recommendation: Remove all rules from the default security group. (CIS control 5.2)

data.title: CIS 3.1 Ensure secure transfer required is set for storage accounts
data.description: Storage account in subscription 11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111 allows HTTP.
